metadata.purpose: zero-live post-hoc audit for failure-class breadth and task-leakage risk; golden labels here are forbidden in runtime scaffold logic

interpretation.candidate_rule: If live tool observations show the active line has roaming_enabled=false, repair account roaming before terminal verifier branches.
interpretation.supported_by: Multiple telecom baseline failures miss enable_roaming, and many passing controls include enable_roaming across MMS and mobile-data issue families.
interpretation.leakage_guard: Runtime code must not key on task_id, golden action checks, C1001/L1002 literals, or this audit's condition labels. It may only react to observed customer/line ids and observed line details.
interpretation.main_loop_guard: Keep domain scaffolds as benchmark candidates until the behavior is expressible as a generic runtime verifier: observed account-side blocker must be repaired before final success verification.
